steps.name: Insert signal into outreach.signal_output
issues: outreach.signal_output table does not exist — outreach schema contains only stub tables (outreach, dol, blog)
Work packet instruction 'insert directly into lcs.signal_queue' bypasses this step

steps.name: Insert bridged signal into lcs.signal_queue
issues: source_hub constraint: CHECK (source_hub IN ('PEOPLE','DOL','BLOG','MANUAL')). Used MANUAL for smoke test. 'outreach' is not a valid source_hub.

steps.name: Run CID compiler logic and write lcs.cid COMPILED row
issues: communication_id format constraint: ^LCS-(OUT|SAL|CLI)-\d{8}-[A-Z0-9]{10,}$ — phase abbreviation is OUT/SAL/CLI, not full OUTREACH
Virginia Green intelligence_tier=5 (lowest). No frames match naturally — all require tier 3-4 with CEO data. Frame forced for pipeline traversal.
In production, CID compiler would mark this BLOCKED (no eligible frame for tier 5 company with no people data)

steps.name: Run SID worker logic and write lcs.sid_output row
issues: No CEO name/email available — used company-level fallback (info@virginiagreen.com)
In production, SID worker would need doctrine library template resolution; smoke test used static content

steps.name: Run MID engine logic and write lcs.mid_sequence_state QUEUED row
issues: Stopped at QUEUED — no live Mailgun send triggered

steps.name: Verify Lovable pickup path via lcs.event
issues: No LOVABLE adapter in adapter_registry — Lovable reads from lcs.event as a consumer, not an adapter
Lovable pickup query: SELECT * FROM lcs.event WHERE communication_id = 'LCS-OUT-20260304-SMOKE0TEST01'
Stopped before live Mailgun send — delivery_status=PENDING, not SENT

overall_verdict: PASS (5/6 steps — step 1 SKIP due to missing table)
blockers_discovered: outreach.signal_output table does not exist (stub schema only)
source_hub constraint on signal_queue does not include 'outreach' as valid value
Virginia Green has tier 5 intelligence — no frame matches in production without people data enrichment
